data.title: Bitcoin Options Worth Over $12 Billion Set To Expire On Friday: Market Volatility Looming Large?
data.description: The cryptocurrency market could experience a major upheaval as investors brace for the expiry of over $12 billion worth of Bitcoin options on Friday, March 27.

data.title: Elon Musk Says Tesla Doesn't Need Lidar Because 'People Don't Shoot Lasers Out Of Their Eyes' After YouTubers Put His Cars Through Wylie E. Coyote Tests
data.description: Despite Elon Musk's public dismissal of LiDAR as unnecessary for self-driving, Tesla quietly became the top customer of LiDAR supplier Luminar in 2024—just as China surged ahead in global LiDAR dominance.

data.title: Lululemon, Braze And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Friday
data.description: US stock futures mixed, Super League Enterprise may report loss, Braze beats expectations, Katapult expected to post loss, Lululemon falls 10.1%.

data.title: Mark Cuban Vows To Revamp US Healthcare By Empowering Independent Pharmacies: 'We Don't Want To See Pharmacy Deserts.
data.description: Billionaire investor and entrepreneur Mark Cuban is taking strides to overhaul the U.S. healthcare sector, beginning with his venture, Cost Plus Drugs.

data.title: Robinhood Says Its 'Cortex' AI Investment Tool Will 'Bridge The Gap' Between Institutional And Retail Investors: Here Is What It Can And Can't Do
data.description: Robinhood Markets Inc. has launched Robinhood Cortex on Wednesday, with early access granted to Gold members, an AI-powered investment tool designed to offer real-time analysis, trade suggestions, and market insights.
